DP.088.0000:
Hello, hello!
I am the official Name Rater!\f
Want me to rate the nicknames of
your Pokémon?
DP.088.0001:
Which Pokémon’s nickname should
I critique?
DP.088.0002:
[0101,0000], is it?
That’s a decent nickname!\f
But would you like to give it
an even better name?\f
How about it?
DP.088.0003:
Ah, good. Then, what shall the new
nickname be?
DP.088.0004:
Done! From now on, this Pokémon
shall be known as [0101,0000]!\f
It is a better name than before!
How fortunate for you!
DP.088.0005:
I see.
Please come visit again.
DP.088.0006:
Done! From now on, this Pokémon
shall be known as [0101,0000]!\f
It looks no different from before,
and yet, this is vastly superior!\f
How fortunate for you!
DP.088.0007:
[0101,0000], is it?
That is a truly impeccable name!\f
Take good care of [0101,0000]!
DP.088.0008:
Now, now. That is merely an Egg!
An Egg can go by no other name!
DP.088.0009:
Excuse me, but do you got that
Pokémon named BUIZEL?\f
Wanna trade it for my CHATOT?
DP.088.0010:
Yes! So awesome! A BUIZEL!
I so promise I’ll be good to it!\f
Oh yeah, CHATOT can learn some human
speech pretty quickly.\f
Try out its move Chatter.
You’ll totally see what I mean.
DP.088.0011: What I totally want is a BUIZEL...
DP.088.0012:
Oh, OK. Totally got it.
It’s all right if you don’t want to.\f
But if you change your mind,
let’s totally trade some Pokémon.
DP.088.0013:
Did that CHATOT I traded you totally
learn that Chatter move?\f
It will mimic your speech if you use
that move outside of battle.
DP.088.0014:
Hi! I’m the building superintendent.
I maintain a vigilant 24-hour watch!
